name: napari
notes: B2 heavy: multi-resource pip package with native Qt bindings. Slow install (many resources, large wheels). Catches packaging failures that small fixtures hide.

name: streamlit
notes: B2 heavy: pip package with many transitive deps. Tests resource block generation and dep resolution at scale.

name: mlflow
notes: B2 heavy: pip package with deep dep tree (maxDepth=3 boundary). Tests transitive dep resolution limits.

name: json-server
notes: B2 heavy: npm package with postinstall script. Tests npm install path with native deps.

name: wakapi
notes: B2 heavy: Go binary release. Tests real GitHub release asset naming and archive structure.

name: ripgrep
notes: B2 heavy: cargo/go binary release with bin name != package name (rg). Tests bin-name extraction from GitHub release assets.
